name: capstan
description: An AI Agent Native full-stack framework for building agent-operable software.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-core && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-router && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-db && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-auth && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-agent && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-react && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-dev && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-cli && npm run build --workspace create-capstan-app
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-app-graph && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-packs-core && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-brief && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-surface-web && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-surface-agent && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-compiler && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-feedback && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-release && npm run build --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-harness
scripts.build:all: npm run build:legacy && npm run build
scripts.typecheck:legacy: npm run build:legacy && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-app-graph && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-packs-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-brief && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-surface-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-surface-agent && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-compiler && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-feedback && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-release && npm run typecheck --workspace @zauso-ai/capstan-harness
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:legacy && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:new: bun test tests/unit/core.test.ts tests/unit/router.test.ts tests/unit/db.test.ts tests/unit/auth.test.ts tests/unit/agent.test.ts tests/integration/dev-server.test.ts tests/integration/full-pipeline.test.ts
